question.text: Under the PFUTP Regulations, 'Market Participant' includes:

answer.text: Any person or entity registered under Section 12 of the SEBI Act and its employees and agents
Only persons registered under Section 12 of the SEBI Act
Only registered intermediaries and their employees
All investors who trade in the securities market

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The regulation defines Market Participant as any person or entity registered under Section 12 of the Act AND its employees and agents. **The Trap:** Option A excludes employees and agents. Option D is too broad - not all investors are market participants under this definition. **Cross-Exam Context:** The definition of market participant is relevant for NISM Series III-A and III-B compliance exams. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This definition extends liability to employees and agents of registered entities, not just the entity itself.
